title: G.SKILL Trident Z RGB 16GB DDR4 Desktop RAM Kit 2x 8GB - 3200MT/s - CL16 - 1.35v
description: Description Please ensure you include a phone number with your order for courier reasons. G.SKILL Trident Z RGB 16GB DDR4 Desktop RAM Kit 2x 8GB - 3200MT/s - CL16 - 1.35v - 16-18-18-38 - F4-3200C16D-16GTZR TridentZ RGB - The Ultimate DDR4 Just Got Better! Featuring a completely exposed light bar with vibrant RGB LEDs, merged with the award-winning Trident Z heatspreader designed, and constructed with the highest quality components, the Trident Z RGB DDR4 memory kit combines the most vivid RGB lighting with uncompromised performance. Full Range RGB Support The uncovered light bar is designed for visual gratification in full RGB. The default lighting sports a fluid full spectrum rainbow wave. Downloadable software allows expanded effect and color customizations to the memory modules. Color match your build and rethink the possibilities with RGB.
